title: coleataenia abscissa
intro: Coleataenia abscissa is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family, commonly known as wild carrot or desert parsley. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleataenia abscissa include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a digestive aid. The herbal preparations of Coleataenia abscissa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
